title: Logical Leaf Litter
description: No more smelting leaves, but smoking them dry instead!
body:
![Screenshot of a YouTube comment that reads "Would make more sense to put them in the smoker instead. Furnace would just turn them to ash"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2aa91a2926270dd39668ca552c31210a2829250.png)

Simple as that. I made this while I was cooking dinner.

I like the fact it makes a little more sense than smelting, and I guess it makes it a bit more worth to find them very early game.

**This does cause leaf litter to show up under the food tab in the recipe book.**
You have been warned.
